name: Gateau Nancy
recipeInstructions:
In a bowl, combine the chocolate, butter, Grand Marnier, vanilla extract, and almond powder. Mix together and melt over a double boiler. Remove from heat as soon as melted and whip lightly.
In another bowl, whisk the egg yolks with 3/4 cup sugar until a white ribbon forms (about 5-7 minutes). Gently blend this sugar/yolk mixture into the chocolate mixture using a spatula.
In a separate bowl, vigorously whisk the egg whites. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar, continuing to whip until lightly firm. Fold the egg whites/sugar mixture into the chocolate mixture gently, aiming for a souffle-like texture.
Grease two molds measuring 10 inches in diameter and 2 inches deep with butter and flour. Place parchment on the bottom of each mold. Pour half of the mixture into each mold and bake at 275°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
Remove from molds and cool on a rack. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with Creme Anglaise.
